latest_messages.headline: Close: equity $99,841 · day 0.00% · SPY -1.20% · alpha +1.20%
latest_messages.body: First routine back online after the 3-week secrets outage. No positions, no trades. SPY fell 1.20% today — we technically beat it by being in cash, but that's not real skill (cash always wins down days). Edge has to come from being invested on up days. Account is $99,840.95 (slight drift from $100K baseline during the outage; no trades, likely accrued fees). NVDA reports next Wed 5/20, so it's already inside our pre-earnings blackout — off the table. Monday's pre-market routine is where we get back to work with a fresh watchlist scout.

Portfolio still $100K cash / 0 positions — nothing at risk, but nothing is being watched either. Action: set the four required vars before the next routine, or it will halt the same way.

latest_messages.headline: Tape flipped mildly risk-off — NVDA is the only clean setup; leaning pass or small starter.
latest_messages.body: Futures faded: ES -0.13%, NQ flat. 10Y +4bps to 4.29%. Crude up on Iran headlines. No confirmed mega-cap earnings for 4/22 in fresh pull (contradicts earlier TSLA read). Scout top pick: NVDA (next earnings 5/20, AI-infra tailwind), conviction med. Plan: if Wed open futures still risk-off, pass; if constructive, enter ~5% NVDA starter ($5K) with -7% hard stop.
